title: Salim Dola, Dawood’s Associate And Drug Trafficker, Remanded In NCB Custody Till May 8
description: Mohammad Salim Dola, a notorious drug trafficker and close associate of Dawood Ibrahim, was produced before Mumbai’s Killa Court after being deported from Istanbul. The court remanded him to NCB custody until May 8. Dola, wanted in a 2023 narcotics case and subject of an INTERPOL Red Notice, had been absconding in Turkey before his arrest. His interrogation is expected to reveal deeper links to Dawood’s international drug syndicate.
